item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-23
item.description: Stock markets reacted to geopolitical tensions as oil prices fell following Trump's postponement of strikes on Iran, while the IEA warns of a significant energy crisis.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-22
item.description: The ongoing Iran war is causing significant economic concerns, including rising oil prices, stock market dips, and increased interest in electric vehicles.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-21
item.description: US interest in electric vehicles rises amid soaring gas prices, while stock markets continue to decline due to geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-20
item.description: US stock markets continued to decline amid concerns over the US-Israel war on Iran, while CBS News announced significant layoffs affecting its radio division.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-19
item.description: Oil and gas prices surged following attacks on facilities in the Middle East, while the US Federal Reserve is expected to lower capital requirements for major banks.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-18
item.description: The Federal Reserve maintains interest rates amid inflation concerns driven by the Iran war, while Trump seeks to lower oil prices through regulatory changes.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-17
item.description: Oil and gas prices rise again after Iran attacks production facilities.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-16
item.description: US oil prices are expected to fluctuate significantly as the Iran war continues, impacting affordability for Americans amid rising living costs.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-15
item.description: Rising oil prices and affordability issues dominate U.S. economic concerns amid ongoing geopolitical tensions and domestic challenges.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-14
item.description: Americans are facing rising costs of living and soaring gas prices, raising concerns about economic management amid ongoing geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-13
item.description: A significant majority of Americans report financial strain due to Trump tariffs, while rising gas prices and geopolitical tensions exacerbate economic concerns.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-12
item.description: The ongoing conflict in the Middle East is causing unprecedented disruptions in oil supply, impacting global markets and raising concerns about stagflation.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-11
item.description: The International Energy Agency has ordered the largest-ever release of oil stockpiles to stabilize prices amid ongoing market volatility due to the Iran war.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-10
item.description: The ongoing crisis in the Strait of Hormuz threatens global oil markets, while US banks consider legal action over new crypto regulations.
